entities.name: P15: Complete Before Claiming Complete
entities.context: Critical quality principle requiring accurate progress reporting and verification before marking tasks complete

entities.name: P18: State Verification is Mandatory
entities.context: Related principle about verifying state before proceeding

entities.name: P7: Idempotence and Dry-Run
entities.context: Related principle about safe, repeatable operations

entities.name: P16: Accuracy Over Sophistication
entities.context: Related principle prioritizing correctness over complexity

relationships.context: Both principles emphasize verification before claiming completion
Dry-run supports accurate progress tracking before final execution
Both prioritize correctness and honest reporting over impressive claims
